sources_note: 資料來源：TechCrunch、VentureBeat、AdWeek、Digiday、廣告門、Morketing、量子位、搜狐、TVBS、TechNode、ContentGrip、Digital Crew Agency 及各平台官方公告
sources_note_en: Sources: TechCrunch, VentureBeat, AdWeek, Digiday, Adquan, Morketing, TechNode, ContentGrip, Digital Crew Agency, and official platform announcements
sections: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
廣告平台 & 行銷科技
行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: Kimi K3 全球最大開源 AI 奪編程榜首，7 月 27 日公開模型權重
items.title_en: Kimi K3 Open-Weight AI Tops Global Coding Benchmark, Weights Release July 27
items.summary: Moonshot AI 發布 2.8 萬億參數開源模型 Kimi K3，編程評測全球第一，AI 指數整體排第二，超越 GPT-5.6，計劃 7 月 27 日公開模型權重免費使用。
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI launched Kimi K3 — a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model that tops global coding benchmarks and ranks second on the AI Intelligence Index, beating GPT-5.6. Weights releasing July 27.
items.why: 免費前沿模型即將釋出，可即時測試用於廣告文案生成，慳返 AI 工具授權費。
items.why_en: Free frontier-level model drops July 27 — test for ad copy and creative generation to cut AI subscription costs.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: MCP 協議新版無狀態設計，AI Agent 大規模部署門檻大降
items.title_en: MCP Protocol Goes Stateless, Cutting Barrier for Large-Scale AI Agent Deployment
items.summary: Model Context Protocol 新版採無狀態 session 設計，解決負載均衡器下多台伺服器協調難題，AI Agent 整合 Gmail、Slack、Salesforce 等工具的基建複雜度大幅降低，7 月 28 日正式生效。
items.summary_en: MCP's new stateless session design removes load-balancer coordination headaches, making large-scale AI agent integrations with Gmail, Slack, and Salesforce far simpler to deploy. Takes effect July 28.
items.why: Agency 為客戶建 AI Agent 自動化工作流，MCP 更新直接降低技術門檻，加快落地速度。
items.why_en: Agencies building AI agent automation for clients can deploy faster and cheaper after this MCP update.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: OpenAI 游說美政府：把強大開源 AI 列為國家安全威脅
items.title_en: OpenAI Lobbies US Government to Classify Powerful Open-Weight AI as National Security Risk
items.summary: OpenAI 向美國政府遊說，要求視強大開源 AI 模型為國安威脅，Kimi K3 發布令矽谷憂慮加深，開源對閉源之爭正式升至政策層面。
items.summary_en: OpenAI is pushing the US government to treat powerful open-weight models as a national security risk — escalating the open vs. closed-source AI debate into US policy following Kimi K3's launch.
items.why: 開源管制若收緊，China market 可用 AI 工具選擇將受影響，宜提前評估工具合規風險。
items.why_en: Tighter open-source AI regulation could limit tools available for China-market work — assess compliance exposure now.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: YouTube 正式收緊 AI 低質內容政策，批量製作廣告影片面臨下架風險
items.title_en: YouTube Cracks Down on AI-Generated Slop: Bulk AI Video Campaigns Now at Risk
items.summary: YouTube 正式釐清針對 AI 生成低質「slop」內容及令人不安影片的管理政策，加強審核標準，依賴 AI 批量生產品牌影片的策略面臨被下架風險。
items.summary_en: YouTube clarified policies targeting AI-generated 'slop' and disturbing videos, tightening moderation. Brands relying on bulk AI video production now face content removal risk.
items.why: 批量 AI 廣告影片策略需重審，確保每條素材符合平台品質標準，避免下架影響 campaign 成效。
items.why_en: Bulk AI video strategies need immediate review — off-standard content risks takedowns and lost campaign reach.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Claude Chrome 插件未修補漏洞曝光，Gmail 及日曆資料有外洩風險
items.title_en: Unpatched Claude Chrome Extension Flaws Risk Exposing Gmail and Calendar Data
items.summary: Claude for Chrome 插件發現兩個未修補漏洞，惡意擴充程式六行 JavaScript 即可觸發自動讀取 Gmail、Google Docs 及 Calendar 資料，歷經八個版本仍未完全修復。
items.summary_en: Two unpatched flaws in Claude's Chrome extension allow rogue browser extensions to silently access Gmail, Docs, and Calendar using just six lines of JavaScript — persisting across eight releases.
items.why: 團隊若用 Claude for Chrome 處理客戶資料，應立即升級至 v1.0.41 以上版本防止資料外洩。
items.why_en: Teams using Claude for Chrome for client work must upgrade to v1.0.41+ immediately to prevent data exposure.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: 85% 企業同時用多個 AI 平台，僅 8% 建立統一 AI 治理框架
items.title_en: Survey: 85% of Enterprises Use Multiple AI Platforms, Only 8% Have Unified Governance
items.summary: VentureBeat 7 月調查顯示，85% 企業同時運行多個 AI 平台，僅 8% 建立統一 AI 治理框架，治理空白帶來嚴重合規及運營風險。
items.summary_en: VentureBeat's July survey found 85% of enterprises run multiple AI platforms while only 8% have consolidated AI governance — exposing major compliance and operational risk gaps.
items.why: Agency 可以「AI 治理框架諮詢」作新服務線，向大型品牌客戶 pitch AI governance 方案。
items.why_en: Clear market gap: pitch 'AI governance consulting' as a new service line to enterprise brand clients.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: 歐盟裁定 Google 須向競爭 AI 助手開放 Android 語音入口
items.title_en: EU Orders Google to Open Android Voice Activation to Rival AI Assistants
items.summary: 歐盟裁定 Google 須向競爭 AI 助手提供 Android 語音啟動權限及匿名搜尋數據，Android 互通性期限 2027 年 7 月，數據分享 2027 年 1 月生效。
items.summary_en: The EU ordered Google to grant rival AI assistants Android voice activation and share anonymized search data, with interoperability due July 2027 and data sharing starting January 2027.
items.why: Android 將向更多 AI 助手開放，品牌可評估未來多平台 AI 對話廣告觸及點的策略佈局。
items.why_en: Android opening to rival AI assistants creates new multi-platform AI advertising touchpoints — start mapping your strategy now.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Microsoft Project Perception 曝光：多模型 AI 安全平台整合 OpenAI 及 Anthropic
items.title_en: Microsoft's Project Perception Revealed: Multi-Model AI Security Platform Integrating OpenAI and Anthropic
items.summary: Microsoft 秘密研發 Project Perception 網絡安全 AI 平台，整合自家、OpenAI 及 Anthropic 模型協作偵測漏洞，定位低成本，直接對打 Anthropic 的 Project Glasswing。
items.summary_en: Microsoft's Project Perception routes cybersecurity tasks across Microsoft, OpenAI, and Anthropic models for low-cost vulnerability detection — competing directly with Anthropic's Project Glasswing.
items.why: AI 安全工具整合多模型成新趨勢，Agency 為客戶建 AI 基建時，應把安全評估框架納入提案。
items.why_en: Multi-model AI security is a new standard — include security layer evaluation in proposals for clients building AI infrastructure.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: 小紅書 7 月全面執行 AI 標注新規：首次違規限流 7 日，三次永久封號
items.title_en: XHS Mandates AI Content Disclosure: First Violation Triggers 7-Day Traffic Ban, Third Means Permanent Suspension
items.summary: 小紅書 7 月全面執行 AI 內容強制標注，AI 輔助創作須勾選標籤，100% AI 生成稿需正文開頭聲明，首次漏標限流 7 日，二次封號 30 日，三次永久封號。
items.summary_en: XHS now mandates AI content labeling: AI-assisted posts need a tag toggle; fully AI-generated posts need a disclosure. Penalties: 7-day traffic ban, then 30-day suspension, then permanent account ban.
items.why: 管理客戶 XHS KOC 排期的 agency，必須立即更新發布流程加入 AI 標注審查環節。
items.why_en: Agencies managing client XHS KOC posts must add AI-labeling verification to every publishing checklist immediately.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: 小紅書商業合作新門檻：1 萬粉絲 + 每帖平均 5 萬曝光方合規
items.title_en: XHS Raises Brand Partnership Eligibility to 10K Followers and 50K Average Post Impressions
items.summary: 小紅書商業合作門檻提升至 1 萬粉絲及每帖平均 5 萬曝光，500 元以上禮品須申報，前後台雙重披露缺一不可，累積 10 個違規分即永久取消所有變現功能。
items.summary_en: XHS raised brand partnership eligibility to 10K followers and 50K average post impressions. Gifts above 500 RMB require declaration. Accumulating 10 penalty points results in permanent monetization ban.
items.why: KOC 篩選標準改變，Agency 須立即更新選博主資格審查流程，確保合作符合新規要求。
items.why_en: Update KOC vetting criteria now — influencers not meeting new thresholds cannot legally run brand partnerships.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: Meta Advantage+ 接入 Muse Image AI：輸入一條 URL 即可生成完整廣告活動
items.title_en: Meta Advantage+ Integrates Muse Image AI: One URL Input Generates a Full Ad Campaign
items.summary: Meta 將 Muse Image AI 圖像模型接入 Advantage+ 廣告系統，自動生成圖片變體，配合 URL 自動建立廣告活動功能，AI 已可由落稿至受眾投放全自動執行。
items.summary_en: Meta integrated its Muse Image model into Advantage+ for automatic creative variants. Combined with URL-to-campaign automation, AI now handles full ad creation through to audience delivery end-to-end.
items.why: 廣告創意製作流程大幅壓縮，可考慮直接用一條 URL 為客戶生成完整廣告活動測試效果。
items.why_en: Input a product URL and budget — AI handles creative, targeting, and delivery. Test for client campaigns to cut production time.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: TikTok 推出 Agentic Hub：AI 代理人自動執行廣告工作流，KOC 智能配對同步上線
items.title_en: TikTok Launches Agentic Hub: AI Agents Automate Ad Workflows with Smart KOC Matching
items.summary: TikTok 正式推出 Agentic Hub，AI 代理人自動執行廣告工作流，同步擴充 Symphony AI 創意套件，支援 TikTok One 內 KOC 智能配對，加速由 Brief 到素材產出的全流程。
items.summary_en: TikTok's Agentic Hub enables AI agents to automate ad workflows end-to-end, complemented by an expanded Symphony AI creative suite and Creator AI Search for automated KOC matching inside TikTok One.
items.why: 由創意生成至 KOC 配對均可 AI 自動化，可向客戶提出壓縮 campaign 執行時間的具體方案。
items.why_en: From creative generation to KOC matching — fully automatable. Pitch this to clients as a concrete campaign timeline reduction.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: Meta 七月起對歐洲六市場廣告加收 2–5% 地區費用，跨歐預算需重新計算
items.title_en: Meta Adds 2–5% Location Fee for Six European Markets from July, Cross-Europe Budgets Must Be Recalculated
items.summary: Meta 由 7 月 1 日起，針對英國、法國、意大利、西班牙、奧地利及土耳其的廣告投放，額外徵收 2–5% 地區費用，費用於廣告預算以外獨立計算，影響跨歐 campaign 總成本。
items.summary_en: From July 1, Meta charges a 2–5% location fee on impressions in UK, France, Italy, Spain, Austria, and Turkey — billed outside declared budgets, raising cross-European campaign costs.
items.why: 有跨歐投放的客戶預算需立即重算，避免超支；更新客戶報告中的媒體費預算估算。
items.why_en: Recalculate budgets for any cross-European client campaigns immediately — this fee is charged outside the declared budget.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: ChatGPT 廣告自助平台持續向代理商開放，新媒體渠道逐步成型
items.title_en: ChatGPT Ads Self-Serve Platform Expands Agency Access as New Advertising Channel Takes Shape
items.summary: OpenAI 的 ChatGPT 廣告自助平台 beta 持續擴展，定義受眾工具與 AI 創意工具兩大功能。Cannes Lions 2026 積極向 CMO 及代理商推銷，ChatGPT 廣告作為新媒體渠道加速成型。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's ChatGPT Ads self-serve Manager beta continues expanding with audience tools and AI creative capabilities. OpenAI aggressively pitched CMOs and agencies at Cannes Lions 2026 as a new media channel.
items.why: ChatGPT 廣告係新興渠道，Agency 宜搶先了解投放規格，向客戶提供早期佈局建議建立先發優勢。
items.why_en: ChatGPT ads are maturing into a real channel — brief clients early to secure first-mover positioning.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: 快手 Kling AI 完成史上最大 AI 影片模型融資：28 億美元，估值 180 億
items.title_en: Kuaishou Kling AI Closes Record $2.8B Funding Round at $18B Valuation
items.summary: 快手旗下 Kling AI 完成約 28 億美元融資，騰訊、阿里巴巴、百度均參投，估值達 180 億美元，為 AI 影片生成模型史上最大單輪融資，正籌備獨立運營及香港上市。
items.summary_en: Kuaishou's Kling AI closed a record ~$2.8B round backed by Tencent, Alibaba, and Baidu at an $18B valuation — the largest single raise for any AI video model. An HK IPO is being planned.
items.why: Kling AI 資金充裕，功能將持續擴張，是 Agency AI 影片製作工具評估的重要長期選項。
items.why_en: Kling AI's massive funding signals aggressive feature expansion — keep it on your AI video toolkit shortlist.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: ByteDance 即夢 AI Seedance 2.5：原生 30 秒單鏡頭影片，免拼接直接出廣告
items.title_en: ByteDance Seedance 2.5: Native 30-Second Single-Shot AI Video — No Stitching Required
items.summary: ByteDance 即夢 AI 發布 Seedance 2.5，支援原生 30 秒單鏡頭影片生成，接受最多 50 個多模態參考檔，可局部修改片段而不需重新生成整段影片，主打廣告及品牌影片製作。
items.summary_en: ByteDance's Seedance 2.5 delivers native 30-second single-shot video generation — no stitching. Accepts up to 50 multimodal reference files and supports partial edits without regenerating full clips.
items.why: 30 秒原生廣告影片免拼接，大幅提升素材質感，建議即時測試品牌 TVC 製作流程。
items.why_en: Native 30-second ad video without stitching — test for brand TVC pre-production to significantly raise output quality.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: 即夢 AI Seedance 2.0 升級原生 4K 10-bit 輸出，AI 影片素材達廣告投放規格
items.title_en: Jimeng AI Seedance 2.0 Adds Native 4K 10-bit Output, Meeting Professional Ad Delivery Specs
items.summary: 即夢 AI 為 Seedance 2.0 加入原生 4K 影片生成及業界首創 10-bit 輸出，針對廣告、品牌視覺及影視製作，VIP 用戶可即時使用，AI 影片素材首次達到廣告投放規格。
items.summary_en: Jimeng AI upgraded Seedance 2.0 with native 4K and industry-first 10-bit video output for advertising and brand visual production. VIP users can access immediately.
items.why: 4K 10-bit 輸出令 AI 影片素材達到廣告投放規格，可直接交付客戶用於品牌廣告活動。
items.why_en: 4K 10-bit output meets ad delivery specs — AI-generated videos can now go directly into brand campaign placements.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: 萬興科技 WAIC 發布三款 AI 創作智慧體：腳本效率提升 10 倍，支援多語言電商影片
items.title_en: Wanxing Tech Launches Three AI Creative Agents at WAIC: 10× Storyboard Speed and Multilingual E-commerce Video
items.summary: 萬興科技於 WAIC 展示三款 AI Agent：劇廠無限畫布令腳本效率提升 10 倍，Filmora.AI 主打品牌影片創作，Virbo AI 支援 18 類電商產品多語言視頻生成。
items.summary_en: Wanxing Tech debuted three AI agents at WAIC: an infinite storyboard canvas (10× faster), Filmora.AI for brand video creation, and Virbo AI for multilingual e-commerce video across 18 product categories.
items.why: Virbo AI 多語言電商影片生成值得測試，可大幅壓縮品牌本地化製作成本，縮短素材上線時間。
items.why_en: Virbo AI's multilingual e-commerce video generation is worth testing — it could significantly cut brand localization production costs.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: TikTok World 2026：Dreamina Seedance 2.0 接入 Symphony，廣告影片生成全自動
items.title_en: TikTok World 2026: Dreamina Seedance 2.0 Integrated into Symphony for Automated Ad Video Creation
items.summary: TikTok World 2026 宣布將 ByteDance Dreamina Seedance 2.0 整合入 Symphony 廣告創意系統，廣告主輸入產品圖或品牌元素即可生成廣告短影音，Smart+ Auto Selection 自動挑選最佳素材。
items.summary_en: TikTok World 2026 integrated Dreamina Seedance 2.0 into Symphony for AI-powered ad video generation. Smart+ Auto Selection automatically picks best-performing assets from creator, catalog, and AI media.
items.why: 可向客戶提供 AI 廣告影片量產服務，降低製作成本，同時增加創意輸出量及 A/B 測試組合。
items.why_en: New service opportunity: offer clients AI-powered TikTok ad video at scale via Symphony — lower production cost, more creative variants.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: WAIC 2026 首設 AI+廣告論壇：利欧宣告 AI 已成「行銷作業系統」
items.title_en: WAIC 2026 Debuts First AI+Advertising Forum: Leo Digital Declares AI the New Marketing OS
items.summary: 上海 WAIC 2026 首次設立廣告行銷專場論壇，利欧數字 CEO 宣告 AI 已成「行銷作業系統」，品牌須優化 AI 被引用而非傳統搜尋排名，並展示多智慧體全鏈路執行系統。
items.summary_en: WAIC 2026's inaugural advertising forum saw Leo Digital CEO declare AI the new marketing OS — brands must optimize for AI citation over search rankings — showcasing multi-agent full-chain execution.
items.why: WAIC 首設行銷論壇是業界信號，可引用此趨勢向客戶說明 AI 廣告已成主流而非試驗。
items.why_en: WAIC's first marketing forum is a landmark signal — use it in client presentations to prove AI advertising is now mainstream.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 2026 中國 AI 行銷白皮書：53% 廣告主已以 AIGC 作主要創意輸出
items.title_en: 2026 China AI Marketing Report: 53% of Advertisers Now Use AIGC as Primary Creative Output
items.summary: 最新報告顯示 53.1% 廣告主已將 AI 生成內容用於創意製作，近 20% 以 AIGC 為品牌敘事主要驅動，策略重心已從「用 AI 工具」轉移至「以 AI 說故事」。
items.summary_en: A 2026 China AI marketing report found 53.1% of advertisers use AIGC for creative output, with nearly 20% making it their primary brand storytelling vehicle — a strategic shift from AI as tool to AI as narrator.
items.why: 此數據可直接用於 pitch，說明 AIGC 創意已係行業主流，唔係前衛試驗，加快客戶決策。
items.why_en: Use this stat in client pitches: 53% AIGC adoption proves AI creative is now industry standard, not an experiment.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: Agentic AI 重塑搜尋：品牌須從「排名第一」轉向「被 AI 引用」
items.title_en: Agentic AI Reshapes Search: Brands Must Shift from Ranking First to Being Cited by AI
items.summary: AdWeek 報告指出，AI 主導搜尋答案令傳統關鍵字點擊率大幅下滑，品牌須成為 AI 引用的知識來源，而非靠排名取勝，中間層行銷崗位亦面臨 AI 侵蝕。
items.summary_en: AdWeek's 2026 report warns AI-mediated answers are crushing traditional search CTR. Brands must become AI-cited knowledge sources. Mid-level marketing roles face significant displacement.
items.why: SEO 策略須重構，Agency 可向客戶提供 AEO/GEO 新服務以維持搜尋曝光，開拓新收入線。
items.why_en: SEO needs rebuilding — offer AEO/GEO services to maintain client search visibility and open a new agency revenue line.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 中國《AI 擬人化互動管理辦法》7 月 15 日生效，豆包千問 Agent 功能即時下線
items.title_en: China's AI Humanized Interaction Rules Take Effect July 15; Doubao and Qwen Pull Agent Features
items.summary: 《AI 擬人化互動服務管理辦法》正式施行，禁止虛擬伴侶、情感依賴等功能，ByteDance 豆包及阿里千問的智慧體功能即時下線，平台轉攻企業端 B2B 服務。
items.summary_en: China's first AI humanized interaction regulation banned virtual companions and emotional dependency features. ByteDance Doubao and Alibaba Qwen immediately pulled AI agent functions, pivoting to enterprise B2B.
items.why: 品牌若計劃以 AI 虛擬形象做用戶互動，須立即重新評估合規風險，避免違反新規。
items.why_en: Brands planning AI virtual personas for user engagement must reassess regulatory exposure immediately to avoid violations.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 劇星傳媒 WAIC 發布星河 AI：策略到電商四環節全鏈路整合平台
items.title_en: Juxing Media Launches Xinghe AI at WAIC: Strategy-to-Commerce Full-Chain Marketing Platform
items.summary: 劇星傳媒於 WAIC 展示自研星河 AI 全鏈路平台，覆蓋策略、內容、投放、電商四環節，以 IP 資源配合 AI 工作流，主打品牌由創意到轉化的全流程整合服務。
items.summary_en: Juxing Media unveiled Xinghe AI at WAIC — a full-chain platform covering strategy, content, placement, and e-commerce, combining proprietary IP assets with AI workflows for end-to-end brand conversion.
items.why: 全鏈路 AI 平台模式係 Agency 服務演進方向，可借鑑向客戶說明未來整合服務嘅價值主張。
items.why_en: Full-chain AI platform model shows where agency value is heading — use as a reference when pitching integrated service propositions.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 易點天下聯同 WPP、Google 中國探討「AI 增長作業系統」跨國品牌新框架
items.title_en: Yidiandianxia, WPP and Google China Explore AI-Native Global Growth Architecture at WAIC
items.summary: 易點天下在 WAIC AI+行銷論壇聯同 WPP、阿里雲、Google 中國，探討跨國品牌以「AI 增長作業系統」重建海外擴張框架，核心係系統整合而非工具疊加。
items.summary_en: At WAIC 2026, Yidiandianxia, WPP, Alibaba Cloud, and Google China discussed building an AI-native growth OS for multinational brands — systematic integration over tool stacking.
items.why: 服務跨國品牌的 Agency 可以此框架強化 AI 行銷整合服務提案，升級服務定位及收費層次。
items.why_en: Agencies serving multinational brands can use this AI-native growth OS framework to elevate integrated marketing service proposals.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 小紅書 2026 AI 行銷新玩法：用 AI 做消費者洞察，讓真人做內容
items.title_en: XHS AI Marketing 2026: Use AI for Consumer Insights, Keep Humans for Content Creation
items.summary: Digital Crew 分析指出，2026 年在 XHS 用 AI 行銷，重點係用 AI 分析搜尋意圖、評論情緒及購買訊號，而非批量生成內容。平台懲罰低質 AI 稿，AI 洞察指導 KOC 創作更有效。
items.summary_en: Digital Crew's 2026 analysis shows XHS AI marketing wins come from AI-powered consumer listening — analyzing search intent and purchase signals — rather than mass content generation. Platforms penalize low-quality AI output.
items.why: 轉用 AI 做消費者洞察再指導 KOC 創作，比直接出 AI 稿更有效，亦更符合 XHS 新標注規定。
items.why_en: Shift AI use to consumer insight and KOC briefing instead of direct content generation — more effective and fully compliant with new XHS rules.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: 行銷人 Prompt 工程四步框架：角色 + 任務 + 格式 + 品牌語境，即日可建立 Prompt 庫
items.title_en: Marketer's 4-Step Prompt Framework: Role + Task + Format + Brand Context, Build Your Library Today
items.summary: 2026 行銷 Prompt 工程指南建議以「角色-任務-格式-品牌語境」四步設計 Prompt，配合多版本 A/B 測試，建立團隊共享 Prompt 庫，每個 Prompt 須經人工核查事實、語調及合規。
items.summary_en: A 2026 marketer prompt guide recommends a role-task-format-brand-context framework, A/B testing 2–3 output variants, building shared prompt libraries, and applying human review for accuracy and compliance.
items.why: 即時建立內部 Prompt 庫，標準化 AI 內容產出品質，減少逐次重新撰寫 Brief 的時間成本。
items.why_en: Build an internal prompt library now to standardize AI output quality and cut time spent rewriting briefs each time.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: 九月前必做：Google AI Max 將自動接管香港廣告主動態搜尋廣告
items.title_en: Act Before September: Google AI Max Will Auto-Upgrade HK Dynamic Search Ads
items.summary: Google AI Max for Search Campaigns 將於 2026 年 9 月自動升級香港廣告主的動態搜尋廣告（DSA），AI 自動擴展關鍵字定向並生成廣告創意，香港搜尋廣告市場規模達 7.35 億美元。
items.summary_en: Google AI Max will auto-upgrade Dynamic Search Ads for Hong Kong advertisers from September 2026, using AI to expand keyword targeting and generate ad creative. HK search ad spend totals US$735M.
items.why: 9 月前須審視客戶所有 DSA 設定，防止 AI 自動擴展定向到不符合品牌定位的關鍵字。
items.why_en: Review all client DSA configurations before September — prevent AI auto-expansion targeting off-brand or irrelevant keywords.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: Virbo AI 多語言電商影片生成：18 類品類一鍵輸出本地化廣告素材
items.title_en: Virbo AI Multilingual E-commerce Video: One-Click Localized Ad Creatives Across 18 Product Categories
items.summary: 萬興科技 Virbo AI 支援 18 類電商產品多語言視頻生成，廣告主輸入產品資訊即可輸出多語言廣告素材，大幅壓縮本地化製作成本，適合跨市場投放。
items.summary_en: Wanxing's Virbo AI generates multilingual e-commerce ad videos across 18 product categories from a single product input, significantly cutting brand localization production time and cost for cross-market campaigns.
items.why: 為跨市場客戶提供多語言廣告素材服務，既係新服務線，亦係加速交付的工具。
items.why_en: Offer multilingual ad creative production as a new service line for cross-market clients — faster delivery, lower cost.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: AI 治理諮詢成代理商新收入線：品牌「用 AI 多、管 AI 少」缺口值得 pitch
items.title_en: AI Governance Consulting as a New Agency Revenue Line: Brands Use Multiple AI Platforms but Govern None
items.summary: 調查顯示 85% 企業同時用多個 AI 平台，僅 8% 建立治理框架。Agency 可把「AI 治理框架建立」包裝成顧問服務，幫助品牌客戶管控合規風險及多平台 AI 一致性。
items.summary_en: With 85% of enterprises running multiple AI platforms but only 8% governing them, agencies can package 'AI governance framework' as a consulting service — helping brands manage compliance and cross-platform consistency.
items.why: 把 AI 治理包裝成服務向品牌 pitch，既有數據支撐，又係目前市場明顯空白點。
items.why_en: Package AI governance as a service — data-backed gap and a clear market whitespace that most agencies aren't filling yet.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法
